$script: Nastaliq (Urdu) — complex calligraphic script. Be Vietnamese Pro will not render correctly; specify Noto Nastaliq Urdu fallback. Test layout in pseudo-loc CI.
$rtl_notes: Pairs with existing Arabic / Hebrew RTL handling in Part 5 §9 bidi guidance.

$cultural_notes.rtl_handling: Per Part 5 §9 bidi guidance: ensure layout flips correctly; numerals stay LTR in mixed-direction text. Verify pseudo-loc + RTL toggle in Storybook.
$cultural_notes.formality: Urdu has multiple formality levels (aap / tum / tu). Customer-facing default is 'aap' (most respectful).
$cultural_notes.religious_context: Avoid imagery / colour combinations associated with religious symbolism. Per Part 5 §14 cultural taboos.
$cultural_notes.regional: Urdu in Pakistan vs India has subtle differences; steward should specify target (default: Pakistan).
$cultural_notes.diacritics: Nastaliq diacritics (zer, zabar, pesh) are typically omitted in modern UI text but preserved in long-form religious / educational content.
